title: Print Stylesheet Quiz
description: Test your understanding of CSS print media: page breaks, hiding elements, and creating printer-friendly layouts
referenceSolutions: @media print allows hiding navigation and optimizing for paper

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about print stylesheets

hints.text: Print styles use @media print to target printed output. You can control page breaks, hide screen-only elements, and adjust colors.
@media print lets you hide navigation, set backgrounds to white, show URLs for links, and control page-break-inside/before/after.
In @media print, use 'display: none' to hide nav/footer, 'break-inside: avoid' on cards/figures, and 'color: black; background: white' for ink savings.
